title: Ghidra lookup
description: Cached Ghidra-derived evidence from a live analyzeHeadless import smoke, with a generated source-symbol index for local symbol/address lookup.
status_message: Live runner v1: headless Ghidra evidence is generated locally by toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/research/ghidra/runners/run_headless_probe.py.
limitations: The live runner requires Ghidra analyzeHeadless, Java 21, and build/GC6E01/main.elf.
The smoke imports/analyzes the ELF and records bounded headless evidence; richer decompile/xref exports can be added as follow-up cache rows.
Source-symbol rows remain supplemental lookup evidence and should be refreshed with tool indexes after report/code-graph changes.

usage.agent_guidance: Use when a symbol, address, string, or binary-derived clue needs corroboration before editing source.
